name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - CFSC Currency Exchange Kimball & North Check Cashing and Auto License (Chicago)
description_short: At 3401 W North Ave in Chicago, IL, the CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM — CFSC Currency Exchange Kimball & North Check Cashing and Auto License provides quick cryptocurrency access.
description_long:
The CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM at 3401 W North Ave in Chicago operates inside CFSC Currency Exchange Kimball & North Check Cashing and Auto License. This Chicago location is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 7 PM, Saturdays 8 AM to 5 PM, and Sundays 10 AM to 4 PM. Located on the city's North Side, this ATM provides convenient access to cryptocurrency services in a busy commercial area.

At this Chicago, IL location, you can buy and sell Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies quickly. Call +1 773-800-0106 for current rates, available cryptocurrencies, or any questions about using the machine. The staff at CFSC Currency Exchange can also assist with related financial services.

For Chicago residents visiting 3401 W North Ave, bring a valid photo ID and a payment method (cash for purchases, wallet for sales). The ATM operates within CFSC's store hours, making it convenient to access cryptocurrency services alongside the store's check cashing and currency exchange options.
pros: Extended hours (8 AM–7 PM weekdays, 10 AM–4 PM Sunday) providing access outside traditional banking hours
No bank account required—purchases made with cash directly at the physical kiosk
24/7 customer support available via phone and email for transaction assistance
CoinFlip Account feature allows authenticated users to increase daily limits up to $15,000
Distributed network of nearby locations across Chicago and suburbs for added convenience
Multiple cryptocurrency options available beyond Bitcoin (specific coins vary by location)
Mobile CoinFlip Crypto Wallet app for managing purchased digital assets
cons: Website does not display transaction fees or price margins, creating fee opacity for customers
Daily transaction limits vary by location and account type, potentially restricting larger purchases
Requires downloading a separate mobile wallet app before transacting, adding setup friction
Cryptocurrency purchases carry high volatility and regulatory risk not addressed in marketing
No information provided about identity verification requirements or KYC procedures
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals seeking cash-to-crypto conversion without traditional banking infrastructure
Cryptocurrency enthusiasts preferring in-person cash transactions over online exchanges
Customers in Chicago seeking convenient Bitcoin access during extended evening and weekend hours
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM is best for cash-based cryptocurrency buyers seeking convenient kiosk access without traditional exchange accounts or banking requirements. The main caveat is that cryptocurrency itself carries high volatility and regulatory uncertainty, and the website lacks transparency on transaction fees—customers should contact support to understand total costs before purchasing.
services: Bitcoin purchase with cash at physical ATM kiosk
Purchase of alternative cryptocurrencies (specific coins vary by location)
CoinFlip Account creation for increased daily transaction limits up to $15,000
CoinFlip Crypto Wallet mobile app for cryptocurrency storage and management
24/7 customer support via phone and email
Multi-location access across Chicago metropolitan area
Educational resources on cryptocurrency buying and blockchain fundamentals
Co-location with currency exchange and check cashing services at this address
